Guide the bell into the front rack with wrist straight and elbow close. Avoid letting the bell slap the forearm or pulling it in a wide arc.

ff_single_arm_barbell_suitcase_deadlift.description: Stand with a dumbbell beside one foot like a suitcase. Hinge and bend the knees to grip it, then stand tall by pushing the floor away. Keep shoulders square and avoid leaning toward the weight.

ff_double_dumbbell_suitcase_deadlift.description: Hold the load in one hand at your side like a suitcase. Set the bar over midfoot, brace, and push the floor away while keeping the bar close to the legs through the pull. Keep the lats tight and avoid letting the hips shoot up before the bar leaves the floor.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_bent_knee_copenha.description: Stand on one leg with a soft knee and hold the kettlebell in one hand. Pass or circle the bell around the body while the stance knee stays bent and the torso stays tall. Move slowly and avoid letting the hip drop or the foot wobble wildly.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_copenhagen_plank.description: Stand on one leg with a soft knee and hold the kettlebell in one hand. Pass or circle the bell around the body while the stance knee stays bent and the torso stays tall. Move slowly and avoid letting the hip drop or the foot wobble wildly.

ff_double_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_lateral.description: Kneel tall with two dumbbells at the shoulders. Brace the glutes and press the weight overhead until the arm or arms are straight, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid leaning back.

ff_sled_reverse_drag.description: Load the sled and grip the handles with the body angled forward. Drive through the balls of the feet with short, powerful steps for the listed distance or time. Stay low through the start and avoid upright jogging when acceleration is the goal.

ff_kettlebell_seated_overhead_tricep_ext.description: Sit tall holding an EZ bar overhead with elbows pointing forward. Bend the elbows to lower the bar behind the head, then extend back overhead. Keep ribs down and avoid letting the elbows flare wide.

ff_kettlebell_overhead_tricep_extension.description: Sit tall holding an EZ bar overhead with elbows pointing forward. Bend the elbows to lower the bar behind the head, then extend back overhead. Keep ribs down and avoid letting the elbows flare wide.

ff_kettlebell_tall_kneeling_overhead_tri.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_tall_kneeling_bic.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with the arms hanging straight and the weight in your hands. Curl by bending only at the elbows, then lower until the arms are long. Keep the chest on the pad and avoid swinging the shoulders forward.

ff_slider_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_revers.description: Hold two kettlebells bottoms-up in the front rack and place one foot on a slider. Slide that foot sideways as the standing leg bends into a lateral lunge, then return to standing. Keep elbows under the bells and avoid letting the knee cave inward.

ff_double_kettlebell_incline_bench_chest.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand. Row the weights toward the ribs, pause, and lower until arms are long. Keep the chest glued to the bench and avoid shrugging at the top.

ff_double_kettlebell_chest_fly.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand. Row the weights toward the ribs, pause, and lower until arms are long. Keep the chest glued to the bench and avoid shrugging at the top.

ff_double_kettlebell_decline_bench_chest.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand. Row the weights toward the ribs, pause, and lower until arms are long. Keep the chest glued to the bench and avoid shrugging at the top.

ff_single_arm_bar_chin_up.description: Hang from the rings with palms facing you, arms long, and shoulders active. Pull the chest toward the rings by driving the elbows down, then lower until the arms are long again. Keep the body quiet and avoid kicking or shrugging through the top.

ff_double_dumbbell_seated_cuban_press.description: Sit tall holding light dumbbells with elbows lifted out to the sides and bent. Rotate the forearms upward until the weights are above the elbows, then return slowly. Keep the ribs down and avoid shrugging to move heavier weights.

ff_double_kettlebell_dive_bomber_push_up.description: Place the feet on a bench or box and set the hands under the shoulders. Lower the chest toward the hands, then press back to straight arms. Keep the body in one line and avoid reaching the head forward to shorten the rep.

ff_double_kettlebell_feet_elevated_pike_.description: Place the feet on a bench or box and set the hands under the shoulders. Lower the chest toward the hands, then press back to straight arms. Keep the body in one line and avoid reaching the head forward to shorten the rep.

ff_double_kettlebell_pseudo_planche_push.description: Place the feet on a bench or box and set the hands under the shoulders. Lower the chest toward the hands, then press back to straight arms. Keep the body in one line and avoid reaching the head forward to shorten the rep.

ff_sled_low_row.description: Load the sled and grip the handles with the body angled forward. Drive through the balls of the feet with short, powerful steps for the listed distance or time. Stay low through the start and avoid upright jogging when acceleration is the goal.

ff_superband_assisted_bar_chin_up.description: Loop a superband over a pull-up bar and place one foot or knee in it. Hang with hands overhand, pull the chest toward the bar, then lower until arms are long. Keep the legs quiet and avoid bouncing on the band.

ff_bar_commando_pull_up.description: Hang from the bar with arms long and shoulders set. Pull the chest toward the bar by driving elbows down, then lower under control. Keep legs quiet and avoid craning the neck to finish.

ff_single_arm_barbell_half_kneeling_bent.description: Stand or kneel in the stance named by the exercise with the load at shoulder height. Press from the shoulder or rack position until the arm is stacked overhead. Lower under control and keep the ribs tucked instead of leaning back.

ff_superband_assisted_bar_commando_pull_.description: Loop a superband over a pull-up bar and place one foot or knee in it. Hang with hands overhand, pull the chest toward the bar, then lower until arms are long. Keep the legs quiet and avoid bouncing on the band.

ff_bodyweight_toe_balance_squat.description: Use bodyweight only with a stable start position. Sit the hips down with feet rooted and chest tall, then stand by pushing the floor away. Keep the knees tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_climbing_rope_l_sit_pull_up.description: Set the rings at the height needed and keep the straps vertical. Hang with arms long, pull the chest toward the hands by driving elbows down, then lower under control. Keep legs quiet and avoid craning the neck to finish.

ff_climbing_rope_seated_l_sit_pull_up.description: Set the rings at the height needed and keep the straps vertical. Hang with arms long, pull the chest toward the hands by driving elbows down, then lower under control. Keep legs quiet and avoid craning the neck to finish.

ff_climbing_rope_hanging_l_sit.description: Set the rings at the height needed and keep the straps vertical. Hang with arms long, pull the chest toward the hands by driving elbows down, then lower under control. Keep legs quiet and avoid craning the neck to finish.

ff_climbing_rope_hanging_l_sit_flutter_k.description: Hang from rings with shoulders active and raise both legs to an L-sit height you can control. Alternate small flutter kicks while keeping the torso still. Lower the legs if your grip slips or the body starts swinging.

ff_climbing_rope_l_sit_climb.description: Set the rings at the height needed and keep the straps vertical. Hang with arms long, pull the chest toward the hands by driving elbows down, then lower under control. Keep legs quiet and avoid craning the neck to finish.

ff_climbing_rope_legless_climb.description: Grip the rope with hands stacked and use the leg wrap or legless technique named by the drill to climb. Pull with the arms while driving with the legs when the variation allows. Descend under control and avoid sliding down with bare friction burns.

ff_climbing_rope_j_hook_climb.description: Grip the rope with hands stacked and use the leg wrap or legless technique named by the drill to climb. Pull with the arms while driving with the legs when the variation allows. Descend under control and avoid sliding down with bare friction burns.

ff_climbing_rope_s_wrap_climb.description: Grip the rope with hands stacked and use the leg wrap or legless technique named by the drill to climb. Pull with the arms while driving with the legs when the variation allows. Descend under control and avoid sliding down with bare friction burns.

ff_kettlebell_single_leg_standing_bent_k.description: Stand on one leg with a soft knee and hold the kettlebell in one hand. Pass or circle the bell around the body while the stance knee stays bent and the torso stays tall. Move slowly and avoid letting the hip drop or the foot wobble wildly.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_single_leg_stan.description: Attach an ankle strap to a low cable and stand on the opposite leg. Keep the working knee bent as you rotate the thigh outward, then return slowly. Keep the pelvis facing forward and avoid swinging the foot.

ff_barbell_zercher_march.description: Grip the barbell with a stable setup for the lift. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_bodyweight_march.description: Use bodyweight only with a stable start position. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_single_arm_kettlebell_rotational_snat.description: Set up half kneeling with the bell in front of the working hip. Hike the bell back with one hand, then drive the hips forward to swing. Let the bell float from the hip snap rather than lifting it with the arm. Keep the back long and park the bell if the swing turns into a squat or shoulder raise.

ff_suspension_pallof_press.description: Adjust the straps so the handles hang at the right height. Press the load away in the plane named by the exercise, then return under control. Keep the ribs stacked and avoid using momentum from the lower back.

ff_climbing_rope_dead_hang.description: Hang from the bar or rings with arms long and shoulders relaxed but engaged. Hold the listed hang position while breathing steadily. Avoid shrugging into the ears or swinging the body.

ff_single_arm_suspension_kneeling_rollou.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_stability_ball_reverse_crunch.description: Lie on your back and brace the core before curling the shoulders or legs through the range named by the exercise. Exhale on the effort and lower slowly. Avoid pulling on the neck or using momentum from the arms.

ff_slam_ball_overhead_slam.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Load through the hips and core, then release or throw the ball along the path named by the drill. Use the legs first and avoid throwing only with the arms.

ff_slam_ball_tall_kneeling_overhead_slam.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Load through the hips and core, then release or throw the ball along the path named by the drill. Use the legs first and avoid throwing only with the arms.

ff_slam_ball_alternating_rotational_over.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Alternate sides each rep with the same form on both sides. Load through the hips and core, then release or throw the ball along the path named by the drill. Use the legs first and avoid throwing only with the arms.

ff_slam_ball_squat_jump_overhead_slam.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep.

ff_slam_ball_tall_kneeling_alternating_r.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Load through the hips and core, then release or throw the ball along the path named by the drill. Use the legs first and avoid throwing only with the arms.

ff_bodyweight_shrimp_squat.description: Use bodyweight only with a stable start position. Sit the hips down with feet rooted and chest tall, then stand by pushing the floor away. Keep the knees tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

ff_bodyweight_hand_assisted_shrimp_squat.description: Stand in a split stance near a support you can hold lightly. Bend both knees to lower straight down, then press through the front foot to stand. Use the hand for balance only and keep the front knee tracking over toes.

ff_double_cable_bayesian_curl.description: Set the cable to the height listed and stand in a stable base. Curl the weight through the range named by the exercise, then lower with control. Keep the upper arm still and avoid swinging the load.

ff_barbell_reverse_grip_incline_bench_pr.description: Lie on the bench or floor holding the bar securely. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_barbell_reverse_grip_decline_bench_pr.description: Lie on the bench or floor holding the bar securely. Press the weight over the chest, then lower until elbows or upper arms reach the target depth. Keep wrists stacked and avoid bouncing out of the bottom.

ff_bar_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Lower the legs to one side under control, return through center, and switch sides. Keep the shoulders down and reduce range if the low back lifts.

ff_ring_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Lower the legs to one side under control, return through center, and switch sides. Keep the shoulders down and reduce range if the low back lifts.

ff_bodyweight_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Lower the legs to one side under control, return through center, and switch sides. Keep the shoulders down and reduce range if the low back lifts.

ff_bodyweight_bent_knee_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Lower the legs to one side under control, return through center, and switch sides. Keep the shoulders down and reduce range if the low back lifts.

ff_barbell_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Lower the legs to one side under control, return through center, and switch sides. Keep the shoulders down and reduce range if the low back lifts.

ff_bar_bent_knee_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Lower the legs to one side under control, return through center, and switch sides. Keep the shoulders down and reduce range if the low back lifts.

ff_ring_bent_knee_windshield_wiper.description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Lower the legs to one side under control, return through center, and switch sides. Keep the shoulders down and reduce range if the low back lifts.

ff_sled_lateral_drag.description: Load the sled and grip the handles with the body angled forward. Drive through the balls of the feet with short, powerful steps for the listed distance or time. Stay low through the start and avoid upright jogging when acceleration is the goal.

ff_slider_chest_fly.description: Place the slider under the working foot or limb on a smooth surface. Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep.

ff_slider_kneeling_chest_fly.description: Place the slider under the working foot or limb on a smooth surface. Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep.

ff_barbell_squat_clean_to_squat_jerk.description: Start with the bar over midfoot and grip just outside the legs. Pull the bar close, receive it in a front squat, stand, then dip and drive into a split jerk overhead. Keep the bar close and recover the feet before lowering or resetting.

ff_barbell_power_clean_to_squat_jerk.description: Start with the bar over midfoot and grip just outside the legs. Pull the bar close, receive it in a front squat, stand, then dip and drive into a split jerk overhead. Keep the bar close and recover the feet before lowering or resetting.

ff_barbell_hang_squat_clean_to_squat_jer.description: Start with the bar over midfoot and grip just outside the legs. Pull the bar close, receive it in a front squat, stand, then dip and drive into a split jerk overhead. Keep the bar close and recover the feet before lowering or resetting.

ff_barbell_hang_power_clean_to_squat_jer.description: Grip the barbell with a stable setup for the lift. Pull the weight close with the legs and hips, catch it as the name describes, then stand or finish overhead. Keep the weight close to the body and avoid pulling with the arms alone.

ff_ez_bar_close_grip_strict_bicep_curl.description: Stand or lean back holding the EZ bar. Curl by bending the elbows, then lower until the arms are long. Keep elbows near the ribs and avoid swinging the body.

ff_plate_overhead_march.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_slider_body_saw.description: Set up in a forearm plank with feet on sliders, a ball, or straps as listed. Push the body backward and forward in a small sawing motion while keeping the plank line. Keep the ribs braced and avoid letting the hips pike up.

ff_slider_parallette_mountain_climber.description: Start in a high plank with shoulders over wrists. Drive one knee toward the chest, switch legs, and keep a steady plank as the feet move. Brace the ribs down and avoid bouncing the hips high.

ff_plate_frog_pump.description: Set the upper back on a bench or floor and place the load across the hips or hold it at the chest. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, pause briefly, and lower under control. Avoid arching the low back at the top.

ff_dumbbell_feet_elevated_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back with soles of the feet together, knees opened out, and feet elevated on the stability ball. Tuck the ribs down, press the edges of the feet into the ball, and lift the hips until the body forms a short bridge. Pause at the top and avoid arching the low back to gain height.

ff_plate_feet_elevated_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back with soles of the feet together, knees opened out, and feet elevated on the stability ball. Tuck the ribs down, press the edges of the feet into the ball, and lift the hips until the body forms a short bridge. Pause at the top and avoid arching the low back to gain height.

ff_kettlebell_frog_pump.description: Hold the kettlebell in the rack or at arm's length as listed. Set the upper back on a bench or floor, tuck the ribs, and drive through the heels to lift the hips. Pause at the top and avoid arching the low back for extra height.

ff_kettlebell_feet_elevated_frog_pump.description: Lie on your back with soles of the feet together, knees opened out, and feet elevated on the stability ball. Tuck the ribs down, press the edges of the feet into the ball, and lift the hips until the body forms a short bridge. Pause at the top and avoid arching the low back to gain height.

ff_suspension_body_saw.description: Set up in a forearm plank with feet on sliders, a ball, or straps as listed. Push the body backward and forward in a small sawing motion while keeping the plank line. Keep the ribs braced and avoid letting the hips pike up.

ff_bodyweight_single_leg_box_jump.description: Stand on one leg and hinge forward as the free leg reaches behind you. Drive the hips through and hop lightly off the standing foot, then land back in balance. Keep the back long and avoid twisting during the hinge.

ff_miniband_march.description: Place the band where the variation requires and keep tension through the rep. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_sandbag_front_rack_march.description: Hold the load in the front rack with elbows forward. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_sandbag_shoulder_march.description: Bear-hug or shoulder the sandbag as the variation requires. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_sandbag_overhead_march.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_sandbag_back_rack_march.description: Set the bar across the upper back. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_front_rack_march.description: Stand with feet about shoulder width with one dumbbell held securely. Squat between the heels, then drive through the floor to stand. Keep the chest tall and avoid letting the knees cave inward.

ff_bulgarian_bag_back_rack_march.description: Place the rear foot on a bench behind you and set the front foot far enough forward to lower straight down. Hold the load as listed. Bend both knees, stand by pushing through the front foot, and keep the front knee tracking over the toes.

ff_bulgarian_bag_thruster.description: Place the rear foot on a bench and set the front foot far enough forward to lower straight down. Bend both knees, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the front knee tracking over the toes.

ff_sandbag_thruster.description: Bear-hug or shoulder the sandbag as the variation requires. Squat down with the load in the rack, then stand hard and continue into an overhead press in one smooth sequence. Keep the elbows up in the squat and avoid pausing before the press unless you need to reset.

ff_sandbag_overhead_press.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Brace tall and press the load overhead until the arms are vertical, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back to finish the rep.

ff_sandbag_half_kneeling_overhead_press.description: Kneel with one foot forward and hold a dumbbell in the hand opposite the front leg. Brace the glutes and press the dumbbell overhead, then lower to shoulder height. Keep ribs down and avoid leaning away from the weight.

ff_sandbag_tall_kneeling_overhead_press.description: Kneel on both knees with two kettlebells in the rack. Squeeze the glutes and press both bells overhead, then lower to the rack. Keep ribs down and avoid sitting back on the heels.

ff_landmine_goblet_march.description: Hold one dumbbell or kettlebell vertically at the chest. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_landmine_overhead_march.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_single_arm_landmine_suitcase_march.description: Stand with one foot on a slider and a kettlebell held at the side opposite the sliding leg. Slide that foot back into a reverse lunge, then pull through the front foot to stand. Keep the front knee tracking over the toes and do not let the weight pull you sideways.

ff_bulgarian_bag_overhead_march.description: Hold the load locked out overhead with arms stacked. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

ff_superband_tall_kneeling_pull_through.description: Kneel tall facing away from a low cable with the rope between the legs. Hinge the hips back, then squeeze the glutes to return to tall kneeling. Keep the spine long and avoid turning it into a squat.

ff_barbell_skull_crusher.description: Grip the barbell with a stable setup for the lift. Set the elbows in a fixed position and extend the arms to straighten, then bend back under control. Keep the upper arms still and avoid letting the elbows drift forward.

ff_barbell_incline_bench_skull_crusher.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_barbell_decline_bench_skull_crusher.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_ez_bar_floor_skull_crusher.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_barbell_floor_skull_crusher.description: Grip the barbell with a stable setup for the lift. Set the elbows in a fixed position and extend the arms to straighten, then bend back under control. Keep the upper arms still and avoid letting the elbows drift forward.

ff_cable_straight_bar_skull_crusher.description: Set the cable to the height listed and stand in a stable base. Set the elbows in a fixed position and extend the arms to straighten, then bend back under control. Keep the upper arms still and avoid letting the elbows drift forward.

ff_cable_straight_bar_incline_bench_skul.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_cable_rope_incline_bench_skull_crushe.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_cable_straight_bar_decline_bench_skul.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_double_dumbbell_floor_skull_crusher.description: Hold a weight in each hand at the rack or by the sides. Set the elbows in a fixed position and extend the arms to straighten, then bend back under control. Keep the upper arms still and avoid letting the elbows drift forward.

ff_dumbbell_crush_grip_floor_skull_crush.description: Pinch the weight plates together at your sides or in front of the thighs. Set the elbows in a fixed position and extend the arms to straighten, then bend back under control. Keep the upper arms still and avoid letting the elbows drift forward.

ff_cable_rope_decline_bench_skull_crushe.description: Set up on the bench or kneeling holding the EZ bar. Bend the elbows to lower the load behind the head or toward the forehead, then extend the arms. Keep upper arms steady and avoid flaring the elbows.

ff_cable_rope_floor_skull_crusher.description: Set a rope on a low cable and lie on a bench or floor facing away from the stack. Start with elbows pointed up, bend them to bring the rope near the forehead, then extend. Keep upper arms still and avoid flaring the elbows wide.

ff_cable_straight_bar_floor_skull_crushe.description: Set the cable to the height listed and stand in a stable base. Set the elbows in a fixed position and extend the arms to straighten, then bend back under control. Keep the upper arms still and avoid letting the elbows drift forward.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_skull_crusher.description: Hold the load in one hand at the rack or by the side. Work one arm at a time while the other arm supports or waits at the side. Set the elbows in a fixed position and extend the arms to straighten, then bend back under control. Keep the upper arms still and avoid letting the elbows drift forward.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_incline_bench_sku.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with the weights hanging below the shoulders. Pull the weight toward the ribs while keeping the chest supported. Lower fully and avoid lifting the chest or shrugging at the top.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_decline_bench_sku.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with the weights hanging below the shoulders. Pull the weight toward the ribs while keeping the chest supported. Lower fully and avoid lifting the chest or shrugging at the top.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_floor_skull_crush.description: Hold the load in one hand at the rack or by the side. Work one arm at a time while the other arm supports or waits at the side. Set the elbows in a fixed position and extend the arms to straighten, then bend back under control. Keep the upper arms still and avoid letting the elbows drift forward.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_seated_overhead_t.description: Sit tall holding an EZ bar overhead with elbows pointing forward. Bend the elbows to lower the bar behind the head, then extend back overhead. Keep ribs down and avoid letting the elbows flare wide.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_overhead_tricep_e.description: Sit tall holding an EZ bar overhead with elbows pointing forward. Bend the elbows to lower the bar behind the head, then extend back overhead. Keep ribs down and avoid letting the elbows flare wide.

ff_single_arm_dumbbell_tall_kneeling_ove.description: Kneel tall with one dumbbell at the shoulder. Brace the glutes and press the weight overhead until the arm or arms are straight, then lower to the shoulders. Keep ribs stacked over hips and avoid leaning back.

ff_miniband_dead_bug.description: Place the band where the variation requires and keep tension through the rep. Brace the ribs down and hold the listed core shape while moving arms or legs as the variation requires. Keep the low back from arching off the floor and move slowly enough to stay in control.

ff_stability_ball_body_saw.description: Set up in a forearm plank with feet on sliders, a ball, or straps as listed. Push the body backward and forward in a small sawing motion while keeping the plank line. Keep the ribs braced and avoid letting the hips pike up.

ff_medicine_ball_alternating_single_leg_.description: Lie on your back with both legs long and arms by your sides. Lift one leg toward the ceiling, lower it with control, then switch sides. Keep the low back heavy on the floor and avoid kicking quickly through the reps.

Lie on your back with both legs long and arms by your sides. Lift one leg toward the ceiling, lower it with control, then switch sides. Keep the low back heavy on the floor and avoid kicking quickly through the reps.

ff_medicine_ball_otis_up.description: Hold the medicine ball at chest height with elbows ready to throw or press. Load through the hips and core, then release or throw the ball along the path named by the drill. Use the legs first and avoid throwing only with the arms.

ff_slam_ball_otis_up.description: Lie on your back holding the load at the chest or overhead. Sit up in one controlled path, then lower slowly to the floor. Keep the ribs down and avoid pulling with the neck instead of the abs.

ff_ring_body_saw.description: Set up in a forearm plank with feet on sliders, a ball, or straps as listed. Push the body backward and forward in a small sawing motion while keeping the plank line. Keep the ribs braced and avoid letting the hips pike up.

ff_stability_ball_kneeling_body_saw.description: Set up in a forearm plank with feet on sliders, a ball, or straps as listed. Push the body backward and forward in a small sawing motion while keeping the plank line. Keep the ribs braced and avoid letting the hips pike up.

ff_stability_ball_kneeling_stir_the_pot.description: Place forearms on a stability ball and step back into a plank. Make small circles with the forearms while the feet stay planted. Keep ribs down and hips level, using smaller circles if the low back starts to sway.

ff_medicine_ball_half_kneeling_low_to_hi.description: Set a cable rope on the high setting and kneel with the outside knee down. Pull the rope diagonally high to low across the body while the hips stay square. Rotate through the ribs and shoulders, not by arching or twisting the low back.

ff_medicine_ball_isometric_split_squat_l.description: Kneel with one knee down and hold the kettlebell near the outside hip of the down-knee side. Brace and guide the weight diagonally across the body toward the opposite shoulder. Let the torso rotate only as far as you can control, avoiding a loose lower-back twist.

ff_wall_ball_half_kneeling_low_to_high_c.description: Set a cable rope on the high setting and kneel with the outside knee down. Pull the rope diagonally high to low across the body while the hips stay square. Rotate through the ribs and shoulders, not by arching or twisting the low back.

ff_wall_ball_isometric_split_squat_low_t.description: Kneel with one knee down and hold the kettlebell near the outside hip of the down-knee side. Brace and guide the weight diagonally across the body toward the opposite shoulder. Let the torso rotate only as far as you can control, avoiding a loose lower-back twist.

ff_slam_ball_half_kneeling_low_to_high_c.description: Set a cable rope on the high setting and kneel with the outside knee down. Pull the rope diagonally high to low across the body while the hips stay square. Rotate through the ribs and shoulders, not by arching or twisting the low back.

ff_slam_ball_isometric_split_squat_low_t.description: Kneel with one knee down and hold the kettlebell near the outside hip of the down-knee side. Brace and guide the weight diagonally across the body toward the opposite shoulder. Let the torso rotate only as far as you can control, avoiding a loose lower-back twist.

ff_dumbbell_half_kneeling_low_to_high_ch.description: Set a cable rope on the high setting and kneel with the outside knee down. Pull the rope diagonally high to low across the body while the hips stay square. Rotate through the ribs and shoulders, not by arching or twisting the low back.

ff_dumbbell_isometric_split_squat_low_to.description: Kneel with one knee down and hold the kettlebell near the outside hip of the down-knee side. Brace and guide the weight diagonally across the body toward the opposite shoulder. Let the torso rotate only as far as you can control, avoiding a loose lower-back twist.

ff_plate_half_kneeling_low_to_high_chop.description: Set a cable rope on the high setting and kneel with the outside knee down. Pull the rope diagonally high to low across the body while the hips stay square. Rotate through the ribs and shoulders, not by arching or twisting the low back.

ff_plate_isometric_split_squat_low_to_hi.description: Kneel with one knee down and hold the kettlebell near the outside hip of the down-knee side. Brace and guide the weight diagonally across the body toward the opposite shoulder. Let the torso rotate only as far as you can control, avoiding a loose lower-back twist.

ff_wall_ball_body_saw.description: Hold the wall ball at the chest and squat down with the chest tall. Drive up and throw the ball to the target on the wall, then catch and absorb into the next squat. Keep the throw smooth and avoid breaking at the low back.

ff_single_arm_plate_turkish_sit_up.description: Lie on your back with one dumbbell held securely with the working arm vertical. Roll to the opposite elbow, then to the hand, keeping the weight stacked over the shoulder. Keep eyes on the load and avoid letting it drift behind you.

ff_climbing_rope_pull_up.description: Set the rings at the height needed and keep the straps vertical. Hang with arms long, pull the chest toward the hands by driving elbows down, then lower under control. Keep legs quiet and avoid craning the neck to finish.

ff_climbing_rope_hanging_leg_raise.description: Hang from the bar with active shoulders and a braced core. Lift the toes, legs, or knees toward the bar as the variation requires, then lower without swinging. Avoid using a huge kip unless the drill calls for it.

ff_climbing_rope_hanging_toes_to_rope.description: Grip the rope with hands stacked and use the leg wrap or legless technique named by the drill to climb. Pull with the arms while driving with the legs when the variation allows. Descend under control and avoid sliding down with bare friction burns.

ff_double_cable_chest_fly.description: Set the cable to the height listed and stand in a stable base. Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep.

ff_double_cable_high_to_low_chest_fly.description: Set a cable rope on the high setting and kneel with the outside knee down. Pull the rope diagonally high to low across the body while the hips stay square. Rotate through the ribs and shoulders, not by arching or twisting the low back.

ff_double_cable_low_to_high_chest_fly.description: Set a cable rope on the high setting and kneel with the outside knee down. Pull the rope diagonally high to low across the body while the hips stay square. Rotate through the ribs and shoulders, not by arching or twisting the low back.

ff_resistance_band_high_to_low_chest_fly.description: Set a cable rope on the high setting and kneel with the outside knee down. Pull the rope diagonally high to low across the body while the hips stay square. Rotate through the ribs and shoulders, not by arching or twisting the low back.

ff_resistance_band_low_to_high_chest_fly.description: Set a cable rope on the high setting and kneel with the outside knee down. Pull the rope diagonally high to low across the body while the hips stay square. Rotate through the ribs and shoulders, not by arching or twisting the low back.

ff_cable_rope_isometric_split_squat_high.description: Kneel with one knee down and hold the kettlebell near the outside hip of the down-knee side. Brace and guide the weight diagonally across the body toward the opposite shoulder. Let the torso rotate only as far as you can control, avoiding a loose lower-back twist.

ff_cable_rope_isometric_split_squat_low_.description: Kneel with one knee down and hold the kettlebell near the outside hip of the down-knee side. Brace and guide the weight diagonally across the body toward the opposite shoulder. Let the torso rotate only as far as you can control, avoiding a loose lower-back twist.

ff_landmine_kneeling_rollout.description: Kneel or stand with the rollout tool under the shoulders and brace the core. Roll out as far as you can while keeping the hips from sagging, then pull back with the abs and lats. Shorten the range if the low back arches.

ff_single_arm_landmine_kneeling_rollout.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_slider_kneeling_rollout.description: Kneel or stand with the rollout tool under the shoulders and brace the core. Roll out as far as you can while keeping the hips from sagging, then pull back with the abs and lats. Shorten the range if the low back arches.

ff_slider_standing_rollout.description: Kneel or stand with the rollout tool under the shoulders and brace the core. Roll out as far as you can while keeping the hips from sagging, then pull back with the abs and lats. Shorten the range if the low back arches.

ff_single_arm_slider_kneeling_rollout.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_suspension_standing_rollout.description: Kneel or stand with the rollout tool under the shoulders and brace the core. Roll out as far as you can while keeping the hips from sagging, then pull back with the abs and lats. Shorten the range if the low back arches.

ff_single_arm_ring_standing_rollout.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_single_arm_slider_standing_rollout.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_single_arm_suspension_standing_rollou.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_landmine_standing_rollout.description: Kneel or stand with the rollout tool under the shoulders and brace the core. Roll out as far as you can while keeping the hips from sagging, then pull back with the abs and lats. Shorten the range if the low back arches.

ff_single_arm_landmine_standing_rollout.description: Lie on your back holding one kettlebell straight over the shoulder. Roll slowly toward the opposite side while keeping the bell vertical. Keep eyes on the bell and avoid letting the wrist bend back.

ff_plate_hollow_body_flutter_kicks.description: Lie on your back and hold two kettlebells locked over the chest while the legs extend long. Lift the shoulders slightly, brace into a hollow position, and alternate small up-and-down kicks. Keep the low back heavy on the floor instead of letting the weight pull the ribs open.

ff_superband_side_lying_hanging_hip_addu.description: Anchor a superband above foot height and loop it around the top leg, then set up in a side plank on the forearm. Keep the body long, lift the banded leg slightly, and draw it down toward the lower leg before returning. Keep the hips stacked and avoid rolling the chest toward the floor.

ff_plate_side_lying_bent_knee_hip_abduct.description: Loop a miniband around the ankles and lie on one side with legs straight. Lift the top leg slightly back and up, then lower with control. Keep toes facing forward and avoid rolling the hips open.

ff_bodyweight_side_lying_hip_abduction.description: Loop a miniband around the ankles and lie on one side with legs straight. Lift the top leg slightly back and up, then lower with control. Keep toes facing forward and avoid rolling the hips open.

ff_bodyweight_extended_range_side_lying_.description: Loop a miniband around the ankles and lie on one side with legs straight. Lift the top leg slightly back and up, then lower with control. Keep toes facing forward and avoid rolling the hips open.

ff_bodyweight_side_lying_clamshell.description: Use bodyweight only with a stable start position. Set the body in the listed side-lying or quadruped position and move the top leg out or in through the hip. Keep the pelvis stable and avoid rolling backward to make the range look bigger.

ff_bodyweight_kneeling_side_plank_clamsh.description: Use bodyweight only with a stable start position. Set up in a side plank with the top leg on a bench as listed, lift the hips, and hold or adduct the lower leg under control. Keep the body long and avoid rolling the chest toward the floor.

ff_double_cable_incline_bench_chest_fly.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand. Row the weights toward the ribs, pause, and lower until arms are long. Keep the chest glued to the bench and avoid shrugging at the top.

ff_double_cable_seated_chest_fly.description: Set the cable to the height listed and stand in a stable base. Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep.

ff_double_cable_decline_bench_chest_fly.description: Lie chest-down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand. Row the weights toward the ribs, pause, and lower until arms are long. Keep the chest glued to the bench and avoid shrugging at the top.

ff_plate_overhead_carry.description: Hold the load overhead with the arm stacked and walk with tall posture and controlled steps. Keep the ribs down and shoulders level throughout the carry. Avoid leaning away from the weight or rushing the steps.

ff_slider_plank_jack.description: Place the slider under the working foot or limb on a smooth surface. Brace the ribs down and hold the listed core shape while moving arms or legs as the variation requires. Keep the low back from arching off the floor and move slowly enough to stay in control.

ff_suspension_feet_elevated_plank.description: Adjust the straps so the handles hang at the right height. Brace the ribs down and hold the listed core shape while moving arms or legs as the variation requires. Keep the low back from arching off the floor and move slowly enough to stay in control.

ff_suspension_feet_elevated_forearm_plan.description: Place the feet on a bench or box and the forearms on a stability ball. Hold the plank while lightening or lifting one forearm from the ball. Keep the ribs tucked and avoid rotating the hips.

ff_suspension_feet_elevated_side_plank.description: Adjust the straps so the handles hang at the right height. Brace the ribs down and hold the listed core shape while moving arms or legs as the variation requires. Keep the low back from arching off the floor and move slowly enough to stay in control.

ff_stability_ball_feet_elevated_plank.description: Place the feet on a bench or box and the forearms on a stability ball. Hold the plank while lightening or lifting one forearm from the ball. Keep the ribs tucked and avoid rotating the hips.

ff_slider_sandbag_front_rack_reverse_lun.description: Hold two kettlebells in the front rack and place one foot on a slider. Slide that foot straight back into a reverse lunge, then pull it forward to stand. Keep elbows tucked and the front knee aligned over the toes.

ff_slider_sandbag_back_rack_reverse_lung.description: Hold two kettlebells bottoms-up in the front rack and place one foot on a slider. Slide that foot sideways as the standing leg bends into a lateral lunge, then return to standing. Keep elbows under the bells and avoid letting the knee cave inward.

ff_cable_straight_bar_reverse_grip_front.description: Attach a straight bar to a low cable and stand facing away from the stack. Raise the bar forward to shoulder height, then lower to the thighs. Keep elbows soft and avoid arching the back.

ff_ez_bar_reverse_grip_front_raise.description: Attach a straight bar to a low cable and stand facing away from the stack. Raise the bar forward to shoulder height, then lower to the thighs. Keep elbows soft and avoid arching the back.

ff_sled_sprint.description: Load the sled and grip the handles with the body angled forward. Drive through the balls of the feet with short, powerful steps for the listed distance or time. Stay low through the start and avoid upright jogging when acceleration is the goal.

1_arm_db_jerks.description: Start with the dumbbell or bar at the shoulder, dip a few inches, and drive through the legs. Punch the weight overhead and catch with a soft knee before standing tall. Keep the torso vertical in the dip.

2_point_start.description: Set up in the sprint start position named by the drill with one or two points of contact on the ground. Drive out with a powerful first step and gradual rise to sprint posture. Push the ground back and avoid popping upright in the first two steps.

2_to_1_broad_jump_land_2.description: Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep. Use a height or distance you can land quietly.

decel_step_ups.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

dumbbell_curls.description: Hold the dumbbells in a stable start position. Curl the weight through the range named by the exercise, then lower with control. Keep the upper arm still and avoid swinging the load.

Keep the lats tight and avoid letting the hips shoot up before the bar leaves the floor.

landmine_press.description: Anchor the bar in a landmine and hold the free end at chest or shoulder height. Press the load away in the plane named by the exercise, then return under control. Keep the ribs stacked and avoid using momentum from the lower back.

landmine_squat.description: Anchor the bar in a landmine and hold the free end at chest or shoulder height. Sit the hips down with feet rooted and chest tall, then stand by pushing the floor away. Keep the knees tracking with the toes instead of collapsing inward.

larsen_bench_press.description: Set the load in the start position named by the exercise and brace the torso. Press through the listed path until the arms finish overhead or at extension, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back.

lat_pull_down.description: Use the setup implied by Lat Pull Down: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

lat_stretch.description: Move slowly through the joint range named by the drill with smooth, controlled circles or holds. Stay in a mild to moderate stretch and breathe steadily. Avoid forcing end range with momentum.

lateral_alternating_bounds.description: Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep. Use a height or distance you can land quietly.

lateral_bear_crawl.description: Set up on hands and feet with knees bent under the hips. Move forward or laterally by taking short, controlled steps while keeping the back flat. Keep the knees low and avoid rocking side to side.

reverse_sled_walks.description: Load the sled and grip the handles with the body angled forward. Drive through the balls of the feet with short, powerful steps for the listed distance or time. Stay low through the start and avoid upright jogging when acceleration is the goal.

single_arm_broad_toss.description: Hold the load in one hand at the rack or by the side. Work one arm at a time while the other arm supports or waits at the side. single_arm_landmine_jerk.description: Stand at the landmine with one hand on the sleeve. Clean the sleeve to the shoulder, then dip and split the feet as you press overhead. Land with both knees soft and avoid pressing before the leg drive finishes.

single_arm_landmine_row.description: Stand beside a landmine bar, hinge, and hold the sleeve with one hand. Pull the elbow back toward the hip, then lower the bar until the arm is long. Keep shoulders square and avoid twisting open at the top.

single_arm_larsen_bench_press.description: Lie back on an incline bench with the bottoms-up kettlebell at chest level and shoulder blades set. single_arm_pendlay_row.description: Hinge until the torso is near parallel and place one kettlebell on the floor under the shoulder. Row the bell to the lower ribs, then set it back down each rep. Brace hard and avoid rotating the torso open.

single_arm_rear_delt_flyes.description: Hold the load in one hand at the rack or by the side. Work one arm at a time while the other arm supports or waits at the side. Pull or raise the arms back with elbows bent or slightly soft as the setup requires, squeezing the upper back. Use a light enough load to keep the shoulders down and avoid shrugging.

staggered_box_jumps.description: Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep. Use a height or distance you can land quietly.

staggered_broad_jumps.description: Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep. Use a height or distance you can land quietly.

staggered_pull_ups.description: Hang from the bar with arms long and shoulders set. Pull the chest toward the bar by driving elbows down, then lower under control. Keep legs quiet and avoid craning the neck to finish.

staggered_push_ups.description: Use the setup implied by Staggered Push Ups: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

staggered_stance_rdl.description: Set the weight over midfoot, brace, and hinge at the hips with the bar or bells close to the legs. Stand by driving the hips forward. Keep the back long and avoid rounding to chase extra range.

staggered_stance_vertical_toss.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

stance_to_wall_drill.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

standing_calf_raise.description: Use the setup implied by Standing Calf Raise: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

standing_calf_raise_on_wall.description: Use the setup implied by Standing Calf Raise on Wall: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

static.description: Use the setup implied by Static: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

stationary_alternating_pogos.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

step_ups.description: Stand facing the box or tire with one foot fully on the platform. Drive through the top foot to stand tall on the box, then step down under control. Keep the knee tracking over the toes and avoid pushing off the back foot too much.

stir_the_pot.description: Use the setup implied by Stir the Pot: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

stop_and_go.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

straight_arm_pulldowns.description: Use the setup implied by Straight Arm Pulldowns: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

straight_leg_bounds.description: Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep. Use a height or distance you can land quietly.

straight_leg_raise.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

suitcase_carry.description: Hold the load at your side like a suitcase and walk with tall posture and controlled steps. Keep the ribs down and shoulders level throughout the carry. Avoid leaning away from the weight or rushing the steps.

suitcase_lunges.description: Hold the load in one hand at your side like a suitcase. Walk with the load held in the listed position while keeping the torso tall and steps controlled. Keep the shoulders level and avoid leaning away from the weight.

sumo_deadlift.description: Set the weight over midfoot, brace, and hinge at the hips with the bar or bells close to the legs. Stand by driving the hips forward. Keep the back long and avoid rounding to chase extra range.

sumo_squat.description: Set the feet in the stance named by the exercise and brace before descending. Sit the hips down with the chest tall, then stand by pushing the floor away. Keep the knees tracking with the toes.

super_man_dives.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

superman_holds.description: Set the body in the plank or hold shape named by the exercise and brace the ribs down. Hold steady while breathing quietly or add the limb motion listed. Avoid letting the hips or shoulders sag.

supermans.description: Use the setup implied by Supermans: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

supine_chest_pass.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

supine_scorpion.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

swiss_ball_hamstring_curl.description: Set up with heels on the ball, sliders, bench cable, or ankle cable as named. Bend the knees to draw the heels toward the glutes, then lengthen the legs again. Keep hips steady and avoid swinging for momentum.

tempo_run.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

thigh_pop_run.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

thoracic_open_books.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

tibialis_raise.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

toe_walks.description: Use the setup implied by Toe Walks: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

trap_bar_deadlift.description: Stand inside the trap bar and grip the handles at your sides. Set the bar over midfoot, brace, and push the floor away while keeping the bar close to the legs through the pull. Keep the lats tight and avoid letting the hips shoot up before the bar leaves the floor.

trap_bar_deadlift_off_blocks.description: Stand inside the trap bar and grip the handles at your sides. Set the bar over midfoot, brace, and push the floor away while keeping the bar close to the legs through the pull. Keep the lats tight and avoid letting the hips shoot up before the bar leaves the floor.

trap_bar_jumps.description: Stand inside the trap bar and grip the handles at your sides. Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep.

trap_bar_rdl.description: Stand inside the trap bar and grip the handles at your sides. Hinge at the hips with a soft knee bend and lower the load along the legs until hamstrings load, then stand by driving the hips forward. Keep the back long and avoid rounding to chase extra range.

tricep_extensions.description: Use the setup implied by Cable Tricep Extensions: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

trunk.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

tuck_jump.description: Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep. Use a height or distance you can land quietly.

underhand_chin_ups.description: Hang from the bar with arms long and shoulders set. Pull the chest toward the bar by driving elbows down, then lower under control. Keep legs quiet and avoid craning the neck to finish.

unilateral_front_rack_kb_march_carry.description: Hold the load in the front rack and walk with tall posture and controlled steps. Keep the ribs down and shoulders level throughout the carry. Avoid leaning away from the weight or rushing the steps.

unilateral_front_rack_kb_march_stationar.description: Hold the load in the front rack with elbows forward. Hold the load overhead and march in place or forward, lifting knees without losing the stacked arm position. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back as the knees rise.

unilateral_strength.description: Use the setup implied by Unilateral Strength: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

unweighted_oscillatory_bulgarian_split_s.description: Place the rear foot on a bench and set the front foot far enough forward to lower straight down. Bend both knees, then drive through the front foot to stand. Keep the front knee tracking over the toes.

upper.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

upright_rows.description: Hinge or support the body as the setup requires and row the load toward the ribs or hip. Lower until the arm is long before the next rep. Keep the torso stable and avoid shrugging the shoulder.

v_jumps.description: Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep. Use a height or distance you can land quietly.

v_ups.description: Lie on your back and brace the core before moving the arms and legs through the pattern named by the exercise. Move with control and exhale on the hardest phase. Keep the low back from arching off the floor.

vertical.description: Use the setup implied by Vertical: stable base, controlled tempo, and full-body bracing. Move through each phase of the exercise without rushing the transition. Keep form strict and reduce load or range if balance or control breaks down.

vertical_jump.description: Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep. Use a height or distance you can land quietly.

walking_lunges.description: Step into the lunge pattern named by the exercise and lower until both knees bend. Push through the front foot to return or continue. Keep the torso tall and the front knee aligned over the middle toes.

wall_drill_double_switch.description: Hold a weight in each hand at the rack or by the sides. Drive through the balls of the feet with short, powerful steps for the listed distance or time. Stay low through the start and avoid upright jogging when acceleration is the goal.

wall_drill_single_switch.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

wall_drill_timed.description: Set up in the athletic start position for the drill and drive through powerful, quick steps. Stay low early and rise gradually into sprint posture. Keep ground contacts under the hips.

wall_half_kneeling_thoracic_rotations.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

wall_handstand.description: Place the hands shoulder width and kick or press into a stacked handstand against the wall or freestanding. Keep ribs tucked, arms straight, and weight centered over the hands. Avoid arching the low back or letting the shoulders collapse.

wall_scap_mobility.description: Move slowly through the joint range named by the drill with smooth, controlled circles or holds. Stay in a mild to moderate stretch and breathe steadily. Avoid forcing end range with momentum.

wall_slides_with_lift_off.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

wall_sprint_drill.description: Run with the rhythm and knee drive named by the drill over the listed distance. Stay tall through the chest and strike under the hips. Keep ground contacts quick and avoid overstriding.

weighted_box_jump.description: Dip athletically, drive through the floor, and land softly in the position named by the drill. Stick the landing with knees aligned over toes before the next rep. Use a height or distance you can land quietly.

weighted_chin_ups_2.description: Hang from the bar with arms long and shoulders set. Pull the chest toward the bar by driving elbows down, then lower under control. Keep legs quiet and avoid craning the neck to finish.

weighted_hip_thrust.description: Set the upper back on a bench or floor and place the load across the hips or hold it at the chest. Drive through the heels to lift the hips, pause briefly, and lower under control. Avoid arching the low back at the top.

weighted_sit_ups.description: Lie on your back and brace the core before curling the shoulders or legs through the range named by the exercise. Exhale on the effort and lower slowly. Avoid pulling on the neck or using momentum from the arms.

wheel_rollouts.description: Kneel with the ab wheel under the shoulders and brace the core. Roll forward as far as you can while keeping the hips from sagging, then pull back with the lats and abs. Start with a short range and avoid letting the low back collapse.

windshields.description: Lie on your back with legs extended toward the ceiling. Lower the legs to one side under control, return through center, and switch sides. Keep the shoulders down and reduce range if the low back lifts.

y_cuffs.description: Move slowly into the range named by the drill and breathe through each phase. Hold a mild to moderate stretch without bouncing. Keep the rest of the body relaxed and stable.

y_cut_drill.description: Start in a low athletic stance on the listed start line. Plant, cut, and re-accelerate through the angles named by the drill. Stay over the feet and avoid standing upright too early on the change of direction.

y_cut_drill_with_reaction.description: Start in a low athletic stance on the listed start line. Plant, cut, and re-accelerate through the angles named by the drill. Stay over the feet and avoid standing upright too early on the change of direction.

z_press.description: Sit on the floor with legs straight and the bell in the rack. Brace tall and press the load overhead until the arms are vertical, then lower under control. Keep the ribs down and avoid leaning back to finish the rep.

zercher_reverse_lunges.description: Hold the bar in the crooks of the elbows with the chest tall. Step into the lunge, lower under control, and push through the front foot to return. Keep the elbows tight to the torso and avoid letting the bar slip down the arms.

zercher_squat.description: Hold the bar in the crooks of the elbows with the chest tall. Sit the hips down between the elbows and stand by driving through the whole foot. Keep the elbows tight to the torso and avoid letting the bar slip down the arms.

zottman_curls.description: Curl the dumbbells up with palms facing you. At the top, rotate to a palms-down grip and lower slowly. Keep the upper arms still and avoid swinging the weights through the transition.
